subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Shouldst thou inquire about the circumstances of the revered father, know that he is beset with great tribulation and hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله اگر از احوال جناب ابوی سئوال مینماای در زحمت زیاد و مشقت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @poems and quotation from poetry, @service to others; to the Cause of God
